programme.title: E9 - Georgiana Viou

programme.title: E1 - Olivier Paradis, Trekking Guide In Morocco
programme.desc: Olivier Paradis welcomes Canadian tourists for a hike through the Moroccan High Atlas. Unfavourable weather conditions force them to change route, testing their capacity for adaptation and their flexibility of both mind and body. During their journey they cross the path of a group of noble Amazigh.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E1 - Trial by Fire
programme.desc: The Darnell’s 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: E1 - Terry's Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. We test fire multiple handguns underwater to see if you can actually penetrate a car windshield and save the victim.

programme.desc: The Internet's best hunting, fishing, and all around outdoor viral videos. Brought to you all in one show with special guest Danny Farris.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E124
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: U.s. Markets Edition

programme.title: Crazy Companies 2
programme.desc: Kwai's brother owed the Fok's family two million and Fok's manager Robert persuaded to merge Fu's company. The three pals joined Fok's to solve the crisis...

programme.title: Twist
programme.desc: Wisdom thief Ren Jiahua girlfriend Ann as an internal, using high-tech techniques robbed by the escort vehicle, have stolen money of one hundred and seventy thousand million. Crime Unit Chief Inspector Li Tiejian with detectives working around the clock to detect, eventually discover clues. Suspect that China and Ann is the mastermind of the case, but there is no evidence against. Lee tried various methods interrogations to no avail, Finally solely strict confession, but two willpower Jianli, tolerate the torture and recrimination Li officers tortured. Until the final drama, all the officers with ingenious ways, the two incriminating expose to justice.

programme.title: Sleazy Dizzy
programme.desc: Lung was an informer of Police in the triad society. But his identity was exposed and lost all memory after hurt. All of money that given by the Police was lost. The Police suspicious Lung had hidden the money. So he was wanted by the triad society and Police. Sing was a little thief, he knew Lung and made friend together. He knew everything about Lung then, and he wanted to help Lung to recover his memory aimed to take back the money. Fong was a manger in a big firm. He had stolen a large amount of money of his firm and was discovered by his colleague later. So he wanted to kill Wu but failed. Fong also wanted the money of Lung, as a result, he wanted to kill Lung also. Wu was saved by Lung and Sing. The Boss of Fong knew everything were exposed and ordered Koo to kill Lung, Sing and Wu. But Wu won't do that because of their friendship...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Manfred Wong (Part1)
programme.desc: Film producer Manfred Wong debuted as a scriptwriter who had been working for various film production companies in Hong Kong. Born in 1950s, he went through the heyday of film industry; witnessed the prosperity of homegrown productions in 1980s to 90s; heard rumor about a superstar being kidnapped to abrupt shooting; but also lamented for decade of steady decline of the city's film industry. Acted as a time witness, he is going to tell us the ups and downs of Hong Kong cinema.

programme.desc: The iconic movie ‘Jaws' struck fear into millions on its release in 1975. Now, experts dive with great whites to separate fact from cinematic fiction.

programme.desc: Will keeps a long-standing therapy appointment; Sloan pushes too hard during the Japanese nuclear crisis.

programme.desc: A pimp-cum-drug-dealer suffering from a mid-life crisis forms a band with his pal to reignite his passion for music.

programme.desc: An intimate portrait of Ben Bradlee, tracing his remarkable ascent from an ill-stricken young Boston boy to one of the most pioneering and consequential journalistic figures of the 20th century.

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Punam and Anuj bought their 1930s home in Surrey they thought it would be the perfect place to build a life together. But they now fear they have made a big mistake.

programme.title: E3 - Hidden Escapes
programme.desc: In New York we visit a hotel hidden airside amongst the hustle and bustle of the John F Kennedy airport - the TWA Hotel. In Finnish Lapland we venture to the deep snow-capped forest of the Urho Kkonen National Park.

programme.title: E9 - Semi-Finals
programme.desc: With just 4 bakers left in the competition, the pressure has ramped up once again with patisserie week, including bombe, and a difficult bake reportedly dedicated to the patron saint of baking. For the Showstopper, the bakers are required to make elaborate entremet, complete with mirror glaze and accompanying macarons.

programme.title: E2 - Addiscombe, South London
programme.desc: George helps out at the restoration of an Edwardian arts-and-crafts terraced house where the amazing original features need plenty of TLC.

programme.title: E7 - Semi Final
programme.desc: Six chefs have battled their way through many challenges to the Semi Final, but there are only three spots in the Final up for grabs... who will take those places?

programme.title: E10 - Finale
programme.desc: The top three bakers battle it out to be crowned South Africa's Best Amateur Baker. For their final signature bake, Siba and Paul request 24 glazed petit fours, which highlight distinct South African flavours. The technical challenge comes with a twist that takes the bakers by surprise, and for their last challenge of the season, bakers have 5 hours to create a large sculpture - the final chance to impress the judges enough to claim the title.

The technical challenge comes with a twist that takes the bakers by surprise, and for their last challenge of the season, bakers have 5 hours to create a large sculpture - the final chance to impress the judges enough to claim the title.

programme.title: E41 - Superhero Bean/What A Load Of Rubbish/The Robot/Ice Cream/Birthday Party
programme.desc: Bean turns superhero in an attempt to outwit a cunning cat burglar.

programme.title: E135 - Zombozo-Land/Legrange Muraille/Big Ben 10/Cyber Slammers/Story, Bored
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max revisit their favourite amusement park, renovated and rebranded as AdrenaWORLD. Unfortunately, the new management is Zombozo and his trio of new henchmen! He's got a plan to hypnotise everyone in the park to form a criminal army. Ben has to set aside his desire to ride every ride in the park and make things right.

programme.title: E11 - A. Terra-ized/Artful Dodgers/Burger Vs. Burrito/Matched/Colors of Raven
programme.desc: Beast Boy falls for Terra despite clear signs that she is more interested in destroying the Titans.

programme.title: E38 - Rare Bird/Bean's Safari
programme.desc: Mr Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: E1323 - Marv Wolfman & George Perez/Space House Part 1/Space House Part 2/Space House Part 3/
programme.desc: Marv Wolfman and George Perez must pitch an idea for the new Teen Titans in 24 hourse, so they brainstorm different concepts for the team.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E13 -Parma
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.desc: Lazlo's friendship with Raj suffers because Raj has only one thing on his mind: marshmallows!

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E16 - Artichoke
programme.desc: Little artichoke sings about being the rhyming queen.

programme.title: E26 - Super Secret
programme.desc: Evil Pea traps Supertato and demands he tell her the secret of his super strength. Supertato escapes and tells Evil Pea that his friends give him his super strength.

programme.title: E3 - Top
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'top' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E28 - Movies
programme.desc: It's Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E13 - Andy And The Chinstrap Penguins
programme.desc: Andy blasts off in his safari sub to Antarctica in search of chinstrap penguin chicks.

programme.title: E1 - The Making Music Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: E13 - Farm
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun.

programme.title: E12 - Tickles
programme.desc: Rio tries to find a missing slipper for her sleeping dad. Dad doesn't mind that he only has one, but Rio spots that the sock on his other foot has a hole in it and feels sorry for him.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E17 - Watermelon
programme.desc: Watermelon performs a body tap routine.

programme.title: E16 - Artichoke
programme.desc: Little artichoke sings about being the rhyming queen.

programme.title: E26 - Super Secret
programme.desc: Evil Pea traps Supertato and demands he tell her the secret of his super strength. Supertato escapes and tells Evil Pea that his friends give him his super strength.

programme.title: E27 - Wishing Tree
programme.desc: Evil Pea blows all the lanterns away during the Lantern Festival. Supertato struggles to get them all back and needs Broccoli's help to save the day.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'top' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.desc: Michael takes part in an exercise to hoist the mainsail of an 80-metre long tall ship.

programme.desc: Alex and Nat meet a new guide, Sithu. Heading north, the team are trying to follow Tim's old road to India's notorious 'Wild West', but Sithu warns of an escalating civil war on the road ahead.

programme.desc: Edward Lee and Ryu Soo-young begin their journey in Busan, Korea's seafood capital, discovering why winter yields the finest catch. At the Busan Cooperative Fish Market, they witness seafood's central role in Korean cuisine.

programme.title: E120 - #MadAboutShoe
programme.desc: When Sam eats all of the moon meatballs Cat prepared for a Special Moon Dinner, Cat has to make more. Cat gets distracted when she finds a shoe and becomes obsessed with finding its matching pair.

programme.title: E114 - Shrinking Stars / FitzPatrick
programme.desc: The Star family finds themselves getting smaller and smaller. // Patrick's evil twin cousin shows up to ruin Patrick' reputation.

programme.title: E204 - Dubu
programme.desc: Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: E110 - Hand-Me-Downer / Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: E319 - Making Waves / Captain Quasar: The Next Iteration
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton are forced to spend time together when they accidentally book the same room on a cruise. // SpongeBob and Bubble Bass butt heads over which version of Quasar is better.

programme.title: E204 - Suite and Sour / Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids - but only because they promised to behave. // When Lucy gets a crush on a 'regular and normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: E212 - Text, Lies, & Video
programme.desc: When a video of Henry and Ray transforming into Kid Danger and Captain Man gets out, Henry must go to great lengths to get it back so that his secret identity isn't revealed.

programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away - much to Squidward’s delight. // When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: Big Top Doki
programme.desc: Doki is sure giants don't exist until they're invited to come and be giants, at a giants' festival. But how can we be giants? They set off to Douai, France to find out! On arrival, they literally run into two giants.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Robbie and Naomi are abducted by inquisitive aliens while in the park, and the other kids have to figure out a way to rescue them from the hovering spacecraft.

programme.title: Whodunnit?
programme.desc: When Darwin's precious Manaia goes missing, he and Newts become detectives for the day to find it.

programme.title: Your Heartbeat
programme.desc: The doctors super-size the heart to investigate the piece of body kit that makes it beat. We meet a Brilliant Body para-cyclist who uses brain power to cycle faster. Meanwhile, Connie comes in with a shaky leg, and Marley has a toothpick stuck in his foot!

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Cake
programme.desc: Henry meets a birthday cake. But when the cake finds out he's too small for the party, Henry becomes a Baker to create the best cake ever!

programme.title: Your Heartbeat
programme.desc: The doctors super-size the heart to investigate the piece of body kit that makes it beat. We meet a Brilliant Body para-cyclist who uses brain power to cycle faster. Meanwhile, Connie comes in with a shaky leg, and Marley has a toothpick stuck in his foot!

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Philippe goes to New Zealand. He explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. On the South Island he visits a town and takes a helicopter ride.

programme.title: Kogelberg - Source To Sea
programme.desc: The youngsters set off through difficult terrain before taking on fearsome rapids. Their journey takes them through a plant kingdom filled with thousands of unique plants and animals, including an unusual sea bird that cannot fly. Can you guess what animal it might be?

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Whodunnit?
programme.desc: When Darwin's precious Manaia goes missing, he and Newts become detectives for the day to find it.

programme.title: Vik Goes on Holiday
programme.desc: Vik and his parents visit the most technologically-advanced city in the world. Amazed by the playgrounds in the city's high-tech park, he noticed that the city kids spend all their time staring at screens!

programme.title: Communicating without Wires
programme.desc: How come we can't hear people talking next to us when we're in the sea? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of sound. Have hands-on fun by making a basic phone, and get to know Guglielmo Marconi, a physicist and inventor – ‘the father of radio'.

programme.title: Pilou-saurus Rex
programme.desc: The Buffycats find a plastic dinosaur in the garden. Pilou wants to play with it, so they go to the park. But the dinosaur starts playing all sorts of pranks on them, and the inventor cat Edison tells them it's not just a simple toy...

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: Kingfisher
programme.desc: Grandad Badger is disgusted by the kingfisher's fishy eating habits and is even more baffled when Binah says her favorite food is fish fingers. Orla and Meabh do everything they can to get Fiona's attention. And Franky's patience is tested by Fab and the cubs.

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts relives her journey to becoming an Oscar winning actress and Wladimir Klitschko shares how he became an Olympic gold medallist and record breaking world heavyweight boxing champion.

programme.title: One Step From Stardom
programme.desc: The Icicles compete at the British Synchro Championships with their complicated new routine. But a rival team has set their sights on stealing the Icicles' crown. Ice hockey player Aren wants to follow in his older brother's footsteps.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: Return To Paradise
programme.desc: Follows college students Red and Eden, who fall in love after being stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash, only to face challenges from their families' feud after they're rescued.

programme.title: Balitanghali
programme.desc: The noontime daily newscast that delivers the hottest news and happenings in the country.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Idol Sa Kusina
programme.desc: An entertaining and informative cooking program that showcases scrumptious cuisines. Together with the celebrities, the show unfolds topnotch kitchen skills and culinary secrets that will make cooking dishes effortless.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E5 - 新人空降攪亂CP關係
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E4 - 解鎖江蘇傳統體育魅力
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E10 - 討論愛情裡的信任與分寸
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E15 - 甜妹爆哭 型男心都化了
programme.desc: 以山野為背景，10位素人嘉賓都攜帶一個秘密進入「真相小屋」，這些秘密可能涉及過去的傷痛、未了的心願等，隨著節目推進逐漸揭曉；秘密成為推動他們情感發展的關鍵因素，也增加了未知性和驚喜感，並放棄了傳統戀綜依賴觀察室嘉賓或專家解析的模式，讓觀眾直接充當觀察者。

programme.title: E10 - 討論愛情裡的信任與分寸

programme.title: Decision To Leave
programme.desc: Kind and polite detective Haejun is entrusted with a case of unnatural death in the mountains. While investigating the case, he meets Seorae, the dead victim's wife, and can't help but both suspect and develop an interest in her.

programme.title: The Point Men
programme.desc: A group of Korean tourists is taken hostage by an extremist Taliban group in Afghanistan. The Korean government dispatches Jae-ho, known as one of Korea's most skilled diplomats, in order to handle the situation. Once he arrives, he asks for the Afghan government's cooperation and uses every means possible to free the hostages. However, his efforts go in vain. Due to his failure, he's forced to work with Dae-sik, a special agent who is an expert on the Middle East. As they begin making their move to get to the Taliban, the first hostage death occurs. With nowhere else to turn, the two become unlikely allies in a race against time to save the rest of the hostages.

Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.desc: While travelling across Europe, Raj and Simran connect in unexpected ways.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。
